# Ægentes

> Ægentes is a web studio that designs and builds websites for shops, trades and independents — proper, fast, and unmistakably yours.

Ægentes (from the Latin *agentes*, "the ones who do") is a small web design and development studio. It builds custom websites for small businesses — bakeries, plumbers, florists, barbers, bookkeepers, and similar independents and trades. Typical projects take four weeks for a standard site, six to eight for builds with online ordering, bookings, or subscriptions. Pricing is one fixed number quoted after an initial conversation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.aegentes.com/): overview of services and studio positioning
- [Work](https://www.aegentes.com/work/): portfolio of past projects
- [Studio](https://www.aegentes.com/studio/): about the studio, how it works, house rules
- [Contact](https://www.aegentes.com/contact/): how to start a project, pricing and timeline FAQ

## Contact

- Email: hello@aegentes.com
